title: Count Numbers with Unique Digits
titleCn: 统计各位数字都不同的数字个数

testcases.input: n = 2 Output: 91 Explanation: The answer should be the total numbers in the range of 0 ≤ x < 100, excluding 11,22,33,44,55,66,77,88,99
